yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Russialinked_hackers_target_Signal_Whats {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Russia-linked hackers target Signal, WhatsApp of officials globally"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-10"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "WhatsApp" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Malicious_npm_Package_Posing_as_OpenClaw {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Malicious npm Package Posing as OpenClaw Installer Deploys RAT, Steals macOS Cre"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-10"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "OpenClaw" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CISA_Adds_Three_Known_Exploited_Vulnerab {

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-27689 - Denial of service (DOS) in SAP Supply Chain"; content:"CVE-2026-27689"; nocase; sid:3145041; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
